meaning: adj.三倍的,(占星术用语)三分一对座的n.三个一组,三个一套
examples: Signs that are trine share the same element as well as the same gender.
The trine formed between Venus and Uranus shows that you are a person who enjoys life.
The trine formed between Mars and Jupiter shows that your physical resources are applied in a well-integrated way.
But I soon was swept up in other games and Trine 2, alas, fell by the wayside.
In this respect, we released several independent titles so far, such as Trine, Machinarium, and The Whispered World.
